---
format: html
---

# Sales of antibiotics in humans {#sec-ash}

{{< include Sales_of_antibiotics_for_humans.qmd >}}

{{< include Antibiotics_in_outpatient_care.qmd >}}

{{< include Antibiotics_in_inpatient_care.qmd >}}

{{< include International_recommended_targets_for_antibiotic_consumption.qmd >}}

{{< include Adverse_reactions_antibiotic_use.qmd >}}
